pass_criteria: At least one gw achieves accuracy_retention >= 0.95 on GSM8K AND speedup > 1.0x
key_findings: All 3 guidance weights pass criteria (GSM8K AccRet > 0.95 AND speedup > 1.0x)
M3 improves GSM8K accuracy beyond baseline (AccRet > 1.0 for all weights)
TPS stable across weights (~51 TPS GSM8K, ~91 TPS MATH500)
HumanEval 0% across all weights (baseline too low for signal)
risks: MATH500 improvement magnitude (2.4x AccRet) may not hold at full scale
HumanEval provides no signal -- should be reported separately only
Differences between gw=0.3/0.5/0.7 are narrow -- may need 3-seed to differentiate
